site.title: Alejandro Zadkiel De Jesus Ramirez | Senior iOS Engineer
site.tagline: Senior iOS Engineer in Banking Technology & Enterprise Mobile
site.description: Portfolio of Alejandro Zadkiel De Jesus Ramirez, Senior iOS Engineer with 5+ years building banking and enterprise mobile applications.

hero.name: Alejandro Zadkiel De Jesus Ramirez
hero.role: Senior iOS Engineer · Banking Technology & Enterprise Mobile
hero.summary: Senior iOS Engineer with 5+ years building banking and enterprise mobile applications. Expert in Swift 6, SwiftUI, and Combine, architecting modular systems, modernizing legacy Objective-C codebases, and automating CI/CD pipelines to reduce deployment overhead by 90%.

about.bio: I deliver senior-level iOS engineering across FinTech and enterprise environments, with a proven track record in distributed Agile teams and global consultancies. My focus is scalable architecture, production reliability, and measurable delivery outcomes.
highlights: Technical mentorship through code reviews, best-practice advocacy, and support for junior developers.
Strategic planning with accurate estimations, sprint planning, and delivery roadmap execution.
Fluent communication in English and Spanish with strong international stakeholder management.

experience.summary: Led third-party SDK integrations in a low-code banking platform, bridging Objective-C and Swift with Factory and Builder patterns. Engineered Fastlane CI/CD pipelines automating builds, XCUITest suites, and App Store distribution, reducing manual deployment effort by 90%. Delivered Apple Wallet tokenization and NFC payment capabilities for a Puerto Rican bank.

Architected reusable Swift frameworks adopted across multiple client projects and managed dependency lifecycles through CocoaPods and SPM. Built React Native solutions with native iOS modules, including Firebase Analytics, Crashlytics, and real-time notification features.

Delivered product features within a distributed US-Argentina Agile team under strict TDD principles. Implemented UIAccessibility for VoiceOver compliance and shipped camera capture, BLE Bluetooth, and Core Location capabilities for a production logistics app.

Shipped features and resolved production issues in a Scrum environment, integrating Firebase Crashlytics and Authentication while delivering adaptive Auto Layout interfaces across all iPhone screen sizes.
